steps.title: Identify the type of line x = 5
steps.content: $x = 5$ is a vertical line; its slope is undefined.

steps.title: Perpendicular to vertical = horizontal
steps.content: A line perpendicular to a vertical line is horizontal. A horizontal line has slope $0$. Any line perpendicular to $x=5$ must be parallel to the $x$-axis. That confirms A is correct.
